perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in professional office attire (white shirt, black tie, black mini-skirt) performing a stylized 'runway walk' in an outdoor parking area. (2) The scene shifts to the woman inside a grey Tesla car, looking at the camera and speaking, followed by her getting out of the car to plug in a charging cable from an EVOASIS station. (3) She stands in front of the charging station and large brand signage, using expressive hand gestures to explain features, and later crouches to point at a designated charging parking spot. (4) The final segment shows her gesturing toward a superimposed infographic about charging rates and credit card rewards while she makes heart gestures with her hands.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music begins immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) An enthusiastic, high-pitched female vocal in Mandarin enters, providing a fast-paced narration of her experience. (3) Occasional 'ping' and 'ding' sound effects are used to punctuate specific information or visual transitions. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic vocal phrase as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook Text: '當你變成OL開始走秀' (When you become an office lady and start a runway show), playful tone. (2) Functional Text: 'EVOASIS 24hr 超級充電站' (EVOASIS 24hr Super Charging Station), identifying the location. (3) Information Text: '一度電才5塊多而已!' (Only 5+ dollars per kWh!), highlighting the price. (4) Promotion Text: Listing specific bank discounts like '10% 回饋' (10% reward) and '永豐 GREEN 卡: 5% 回饋' (Sinopac GREEN card: 5% reward).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator featured throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman dressed in 'Office Lady' style: a tight white long-sleeved shirt, a black necktie, a black mini-skirt, and black sheer stockings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor electric vehicle charging facility with grey flooring, brand signage (EVOASIS), and charging pillars. Tall urban residential buildings are visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Practical Demo -> Economic Benefit Analysis
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a commercial endorsement for EVOASIS charging stations. It utilizes a lifestyle 'Office Lady' hook to grab attention, then transitions into a functional demonstration of the charging process and a detailed breakdown of costs and credit card benefits to encourage EV owners to use this specific brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly mentions the brand name multiple times, demonstrates how to use the equipment, and provides a list of specific credit card cashback offers for the service.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Office Lady outfit theme combined with technical EV information.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges 'eye-candy' content with practical consumer information, likely targeting male EV owners in the Taiwan market.
